zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev於1032年出生在烏克蘭Київ時，她的父親Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod54歲，母親Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv31歲。她於1044年與Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson在蘇聯烏克蘭Київська областьКиїв結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1066年9月25日之後在挪威奧斯特藍德特。

zh-hans.Folkinsberg, Eidsberg, Ostfold, Norway: 挪威奧斯特福爾德艾斯波格

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev于1032年出生在乌克兰Київ时，她的父亲Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod54岁，母亲Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv31岁。她于1044年与Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson在苏联乌克兰Київська областьКиїв结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1066年9月25日之后在挪威奧斯特藍德特。

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Kiev
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Austrian German: occupational name for a cowherd, Chüyger in the Tyrolean dialect, from Kühe ‘cows’ (plural of Kuh) + -er suffix of agent nouns.
Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Keir  .

variants.name: Kear
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is a northern English local name for someone who lived by a patch of wet ground overgrown with brushwood (Old Norse kjarr).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev was born in 1032, in Kyiv, Ukraine, her father, Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod, was 54 and her mother, Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv, was 31. She married Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson in 1044, in Kyiv, Kyiv, Ukraine, Soviet Union. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died after 25 September 1066, in Østlandet, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev est née en 1032, à Kyiv, Ukraine, son père, Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson en 1044, à Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ukraine, Union soviétique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée après 25 septembre 1066, à Østlandet, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev 1032 in Kyiv, Ukraine geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod 54 und ihre Mutter Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv 31. Sie hat 1044 in Kiew, Kyiv, Ukraine, Sowjetunion Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 25. September 1066 in Østlandet, Norwegen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev è nata il nel 1032 nel Kyiv, Ucraina, sua padre, Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson nel 1044, nel Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucraina, Sowjetunion. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 25 settembre 1066, nel Østlandet, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kievが1032年にウクライナКиївで生まれた時，父Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorodは54歳，母Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyivは31歳であった。1044年にソビエト連邦ウクライナКиївська областьКиївでHarald "Hardråde" Sigurdssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1066年9月25日以後にノルウェーoストランデトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev(이)가 1032년 우크라이나 Київ에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1044년 소련 우크라이나 Київська область Київ에서 Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1066년 9월 25일 이후 노르웨이 o스틀랜데트에서 사망했다.

mn.Kyiv: Київ, Київська область, Україна, Советтер Союз

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev nasceu em 1032, em Kyiv, Ucrânia, seu pai, Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson em 1044, em Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucrânia, Sowjetunion. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu após 25 de setembro de 1066, em Østlandet, Noruega.

ru.Kyiv: Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev родилась в 1032 г. в местности Киев, Украина, её отцу по имени Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson в 1044 г. в местности Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла после 25 сентябрь 1066 г. в местности oстландет, Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev nació en 1032, en Kyiv, Ucrania, su papá, Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson en 1044, en Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucrania, Unión Soviética. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió después de 25 de septiembre de 1066, en Østlandet, Noruega.
